prompt: A medieval illuminated-manuscript recipe page giving step-by-step visual instructions for brewing 3D-printed bread, with gold leaf borders and ribboned callouts
prompt_refined: Generate a full-page image of an exquisitely detailed medieval illuminated manuscript. This manuscript page functions as a recipe, visually depicting step-by-step instructions for 'brewing 3D-printed bread'. The entire page is framed by intricate, shimmering gold leaf borders. Within the page's layout, all key textual labels, instructions, or callouts are presented within elegantly flowing, ribbon-like banners. The visual style should be authentic to medieval illuminated manuscripts, seamlessly integrating the anachronistic concepts of 3D printing and brewing within its historical aesthetic.
objects: Key textual labels, instructions, or callouts within banners
Imagery of 3D printing equipment (integrated into medieval aesthetic)
Imagery of brewing equipment (integrated into medieval aesthetic)
